name_en: Place de la Bourse & Miroir d'Eau
name_local: Place de la Bourse & Miroir d'Eau

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the Miroir d'Eau mist cycle starts
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence le brouillard du Miroir d'Eau ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur koh-MAHNS luh broo-YAR doo mee-RWAHR doh
phrases.cultural_note: The Miroir d'Eau alternates between a shallow reflecting pool and a fog mist display roughly every 15 minutes in warm months.

phrases.intent_en: Ask someone to take a photo of you in front of the fountain
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me prendre en photo devant la fontaine, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh PRAHN-druh ahn foh-TOH duh-VAHN lah fohn-TEN seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Place de la Bourse is Bordeaux's most iconic landmark and a UNESCO World Heritage site.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Miroir d'Eau is in mist or water mode
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le Miroir d'Eau est en mode brouillard ou en mode miroir en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh luh mee-RWAHR doh eh ahn mod broo-YAR oo ahn mod mee-RWAHR ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The water feature cycles through modes seasonally; it is typically dry in winter.

responses.phonetic: ahn suh moh-MAHN, seh luh MOD BROOM
responses.french: En ce moment, c'est le mode brume.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the quays along the Garonne
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous m'indiquer les quais de la Garonne, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo mahn-dee-KAY lay KAY duh lah gah-RON seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The revitalised quays stretch along the Garonne and are popular for evening strolls and cycling.

responses.english: Walk along the quay to the right.
responses.phonetic: lohn-ZHAY luh KEH vehr lah DRWAHT
responses.french: Longez le quai vers la droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the Miroir d'Eau closes for the season
phrases.text_local: Jusqu'à quand fonctionne le Miroir d'Eau cette année ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhoos-KAH KAHN fonk-SYOHN luh mee-RWAR DOH set ah-NAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Miroir d'Eau operates seasonally, typically from spring through autumn, and is turned off in winter.

responses.english: Until the end of October, normally.
